DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL TIME TO SUBMIT FURTHER BRIEFING IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE TILL 12/5 TO FILE THEIR REPLY AND THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 9, 2008 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SEAN MCKEAN AND SHAWN MCILVENNA'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND JUDGMENT AGAINST PLAINTIFF STEPHEN E. LAWRENCE. THE MOTION IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES HAD A LANDLORD - TENANT RELATIONSHIP, THE COMPLAINT FILED DEALT WITH TORTIOUS CONDUCT THAT DID NOT ARISE OUT OF THE EXECUTION OF THE LEASE. IN ADDITION, THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AS IT WAS NOT MADE UNDER CCP 128.7 AS REQUIRED, AND THERE IS NO BASIS BEFORE THE COURT TO RULE ON PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DECLARE THAT THERE IS NO PREVAILING PARTY. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attornes Fees And Judgement Against Pltf Stephen E. Lawrence; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SEAN MCKEAN AND SHAWN MCILVENNA'S Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees And Judgment Against Plaintiff Stephen E. Lawrence.
APPEARANCES: Russ Martin, Esq. of Law Office of Russ Martin 596-5794 for pltf & opposing party; Mark Hooshmand, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group 835-5900 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE MOTION IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES HAD A LANDLORD - TENANT RELATIONSHIP, THE COMPLAINT FILED DEALT WITH TORTIOUS CONDUCT THAT DID NOT ARISE OUT OF THE EXECUTION OF THE LEASE. In addition, the Court denied plaintiff's request for attorneys fees as it was not made under CCP 128.7 as required, and there is no basis before the Court to rule on plaintiff's request to declare that there is no prevailing party. Plaintiff to prepare proposed form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
